flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Misericordia University rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($20.9k → $24.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Misericordia University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.9k → $40.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Misericordia University fell 92% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Misericordia University rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 (2.0k → 2.3k).
